message.content:
🗳️  **WAVE COMMUNITY GOVERNANCE VOTING**

📝 **SUBMIT FOR FREE**
└─ Post your map submission in <#1508030522746605690>
   • **1 submission** per person each week
   • Submissions **cannot be changed** once posted

🗺️ **YOUR VOTE MATTERS**
└─ Vote in <#1508289287169511496> for the drop maps you want made
   • **2 votes** per person each week

🏆 **MOST VOTES WIN**
└─ The map with the **highest votes** in <#1508289287169511496> wins
   • Selected map gets added to <#1210837116649742396>
   • **Made for FREE for anyone that voted for that map** 🚀
